# services.documize

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.documize`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.documize.cert` | `null or string` | The {file}`cert.pem` file used for https. |
| `services.documize.db` | `string` | Database specific connection string for example: - MySQL/Percona/MariaDB: `user:password@tcp(host:3306)/documize` - MySQLv8+: `user:password@tcp(host:3306)/documize?allowNativePasswords=true` - PostgreSQL: `host=localhost port=5432 dbname=documize user=admin password=secret sslmode=disable` - MSSQL: `sqlserver://username:password@localhost:1433?database=Documize` or `sqlserver://sa@localhost/SQLExpress?database=Documize` |
| `services.documize.dbtype` | `one of "mysql", "percona", "mariadb", "postgresql", "sqlserver"` | Specify the database provider: `mysql`, `percona`, `mariadb`, `postgresql`, `sqlserver` |
| `services.documize.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Documize Wiki. |
| `services.documize.forcesslport` | `null or 16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | Redirect given http port number to TLS. |
| `services.documize.key` | `null or string` | The {file}`key.pem` file used for https. |
| `services.documize.location` | `null or string` | reserved |
| `services.documize.offline` | `boolean` | Set `true` for offline mode. |
| `services.documize.package` | `package` | The documize-community package to use. |
| `services.documize.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The http/https port number. |
| `services.documize.salt` | `null or string` | The salt string used to encode JWT tokens, if not set a random value will be generated. |
| `services.documize.stateDirectoryName` | `string` | The name of the directory below {file}`/var/lib/private` where documize runs in and stores, for example, backups. |
